subject: [CPS] Add CPS Global Variables
commit_message:
[CPS] Add CPS Global Variables

Adding CPS Global Variables to be used in running cps robot tests

Issue-ID: CPS-840
Change-Id: I7aa562708323c73b3d4c74103f2061b5be02a8fa
Signed-off-by: Nagendra90287 <nagendrakumar.pal@amdocs.com>

entries.message:

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/4426/ : FAILURE

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/4426/ )

It seems that you don"t have a commit body.

You must add at least one sentence explaining the purpose of the commit ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/4426/ )
